name: Hot Crab Spread
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces cream cheese, at room temperature
7 1/2 oz can crabmeat (or 7 to 8 oz imitation crab)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the cream cheese and add milk and Worcestershire sauce. Blend well.
2. Drain and flake the crabmeat. Add to the cheese mixture with the green onions.
3. Turn into a greased 8-inch pie plate or small shallow baking dish. Top with 2 tablespoons toasted slivered almonds.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes. Serve warm on crackers.
